title: Eastern Continent
content:
The 
Eastern Continent
 is a part of the territory controlled by the Celestial Clan and ruled by Grand Empyrean Gemini. It is also home to the 
Celestial Clan
's 
Nine Sects and Thirteen Factions
.

Seventy Two Continents
[
]

Heavenly Bull Continent

Green Devil Continent

Great Sage Continent

Meng Earth Continent

Nuo Yun Continent

Hai Lou Continent

Nine Devil Continent

Spirit Dragon Continent

Mountain Spirit Continent

Mountain Sea Continent
